title: Self-Supervised Representation Learning for CAD
abstract: Proposes to leverage unlabeled CAD geometry on supervised learning tasks. Learns a novel hybrid implicit/explicit surface representation for B-Rep geometry, showing that self-supervised pre-training on unlabeled B-Rep data significantly improves downstream classification and segmentation with limited labels.
method_summary: Hybrid implicit/explicit surface representation for B-Rep. Self-supervised pre-training on unlabeled CAD data using reconstruction objectives, then fine-tuning for classification and segmentation.

title: BrepGen: A B-rep Generative Diffusion Model with Structured Latent Geometry
abstract: BrepGen is a diffusion-based generative approach that directly outputs B-rep CAD models. Represents a B-rep model as a novel structured latent geometry in a hierarchical tree, with each element (face, edge, vertex) encoded as a fixed-length latent. Progressively denoises geometry and topology.
method_summary: Hierarchical tree representation of B-rep with structured latent geometry. Diffusion model progressively denoises faces, edges, and vertices to form water-tight solid models.

title: NH-Rep: Implicit Conversion of Manifold B-Rep Solids by Neural Halfspace Representation
abstract: NH-Rep converts manifold B-Rep solids to implicit representations using a Boolean tree built on neural implicit functions. The composite Boolean function represents solid geometry while preserving sharp features, enabling differentiable operations on B-Rep models.
method_summary: Builds a Boolean tree of neural implicit halfspace functions that mirrors B-Rep topology. Each face maps to a halfspace, and CSG-like Boolean operations compose the solid, preserving sharp edges and corners.

title: Split-and-Fit: Learning B-Reps via Structure-Aware Voronoi Partitioning
abstract: Introduces a top-down, structure-aware method for acquiring B-Reps of 3D CAD models from point clouds. First applies Voronoi-based spatial partitioning (split), then fits a single primitive per partition (fit). Contrasts with prior bottom-up approaches.
method_summary: Top-down approach: learns Voronoi diagram-based spatial partitioning of 3D space, then fits one surface primitive per cell. Structure-aware partitioning naturally captures B-Rep topology.

key_results.brep_reconstruction: novel top-down paradigm for B-Rep acquisition

title: CAD 3D Model Classification by Graph Neural Networks: A New Approach Based on STEP Format
abstract: Introduces a new approach for retrieval and classification of 3D models that directly operates on CAD format (STEP files) without conversion to point clouds or meshes, avoiding information loss. Uses graph neural networks on the native CAD data structure.
method_summary: Parses STEP files into graph representations preserving native CAD topology and geometry. Applies GNN for classification and retrieval directly on the parametric CAD representation.

title: Uni3D: Exploring Unified 3D Representation at Scale
abstract: Uni3D is a 3D foundation model that explores unified 3D representation at scale. Uses a 2D-initialized ViT end-to-end pretrained to align 3D point cloud features with image and text features from CLIP. Achieves state-of-the-art on multiple 3D understanding benchmarks.
method_summary: Scales up 3D representation learning by initializing a ViT from 2D pre-trained weights and aligning point cloud features with CLIP image-text space through contrastive learning on large-scale 3D datasets.

title: ULIP: Learning a Unified Representation of Language, Images, and Point Clouds for 3D Understanding
abstract: ULIP learns a unified representation of images, texts, and 3D point clouds by pre-training with object triplets from the three modalities. Leverages pre-aligned CLIP image-text space to bootstrap 3D understanding without manual 3D annotations.
method_summary: Tri-modal contrastive pre-training aligning point clouds with CLIP image-text space using automatically generated triplets. Improves multiple 3D backbones for zero-shot and few-shot classification.

title: ULIP-2: Towards Scalable Multimodal Pre-training for 3D Understanding
abstract: ULIP-2 is a scalable tri-modal pre-training framework that leverages large multimodal models to automatically generate holistic language descriptions for 3D shapes, eliminating the need for manual annotations. Scales up backbones for better multi-modal representation learning.
method_summary: Uses LLMs to auto-generate rich text descriptions for 3D shapes, enabling scalable tri-modal (text-image-point cloud) contrastive pre-training without manual 3D annotations.

title: Point-Bind & Point-LLM: Aligning Point Cloud with Multi-modality for 3D Understanding, Generation, and Instruction Following
abstract: Point-Bind aligns 3D point clouds with 2D images, language, audio, and video via ImageBind. Point-LLM is the first 3D large language model following 3D multi-modal instructions, enabling 3D question answering and reasoning.
method_summary: Aligns point cloud encoder with ImageBind's joint embedding space for multi-modal 3D understanding. Point-LLM injects aligned 3D features into LLM for instruction-following 3D reasoning.

title: LaGeM: A Large Geometry Model for 3D Representation Learning and Diffusion
abstract: Introduces a hierarchical autoencoder that maps 3D models into a highly compressed latent space. Designed to tackle challenges of large-scale 3D datasets with varying complexity. Each level controls different geometric levels of detail. Enables cascaded diffusion for generation.
method_summary: U-Net-inspired hierarchical autoencoder compresses 3D geometry into multi-level latent codes. Cascaded diffusion model generates 3D shapes by progressively refining from coarse to fine geometric detail.

title: Accurate Instance-Level CAD Model Retrieval in a Large-Scale Database
abstract: Presents a solution for fine-grained retrieval of clean CAD models from a large-scale database to recover detailed object shape geometries for RGBD scans. Leverages discriminative learned representations for category distinction and a novel robust point set distance metric for re-ranking.
method_summary: Two-stage retrieval: learned embeddings for coarse category filtering, then robust point set distance metric for fine-grained instance-level re-ranking within the category.

key_results.instance_retrieval: accurate fine-grained CAD retrieval from scans

title: HOC-Search: Efficient CAD Model and Pose Retrieval from RGB-D Scans
abstract: Automated and efficient approach for retrieving high-quality CAD models and their poses from RGB-D scans. Investigates various objective functions for measuring similarity between candidate CAD models and scan data, finding render-and-compare to be most effective.
method_summary: Render-and-compare objective with Monte Carlo Tree Search for efficient exploration of the CAD model and pose space. Balances retrieval quality with computational efficiency.

key_results.efficient_retrieval: fast and accurate CAD retrieval from RGB-D

title: DeepMill: Neural Accessibility Learning for Subtractive Manufacturing
abstract: DeepMill is the first neural framework for predicting inaccessible and occlusion regions under varying machining tool parameters for subtractive manufacturing. Applicable to complex 3D CAD models for manufacturability analysis.
method_summary: Neural network predicts per-point accessibility given tool geometry parameters. Trained on synthetic accessibility labels computed from geometric analysis, generalizes to unseen shapes and tool configurations.

key_results.accessibility_prediction: first neural framework for machining accessibility

title: ReCAD: Reinforcement Learning Enhanced Parametric CAD Model Generation with Vision-Language Models
abstract: ReCAD is an RL framework that bootstraps pretrained large models to generate precise parametric CAD models from multimodal inputs. Fine-tunes VLMs for basic CAD generation, then uses RL with geometric reward signals to improve precision.
method_summary: Two-stage: SFT on VLM for basic CAD script generation from images/text, then RL with geometric reward (chamfer distance, validity) to refine generation quality.

key_results.rl_enhanced_generation: improved precision via geometric RL rewards

title: Cadrille: Multi-modal CAD Reconstruction with Online Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Multi-modal CAD reconstruction model leveraging VLMs and online RL. Two-stage pipeline: SFT on procedurally generated data, then RL with geometric rewards. Achieves state-of-the-art across various datasets including real-world ones.
method_summary: SFT stage trains VLM on large-scale procedural CAD data. Online RL stage uses chamfer distance and validity rewards to improve reconstruction quality. Handles point cloud, image, and text inputs.

title: ArtiCAD: Articulated CAD Assembly Design via Multi-Agent Code Generation
abstract: First training-free multi-agent system for generating editable, articulated CAD assemblies from text or images. Predicts assembly relationships during design stage rather than assembly stage. Divides complex task among specialized agents.
method_summary: Multi-agent LLM system where specialized agents handle part design, joint specification, and assembly relationship prediction. Generates CadQuery code for editable parametric assemblies.

key_results.articulated_assembly: first training-free articulated CAD assembly generation

title: CADSmith: Multi-Agent CAD Generation with Programmatic Geometric Validation
abstract: Multi-agent pipeline that generates CadQuery code from natural language. Iterative refinement through two nested correction loops: inner loop for geometric validation, outer loop for semantic alignment. Programmatic validation ensures geometric correctness.
method_summary: Multi-agent architecture with planner, coder, and validator agents. Inner loop checks geometric validity via CadQuery execution, outer loop verifies semantic alignment with user intent.

key_results.multi_agent_cad: robust CAD generation with programmatic validation

title: SketchCleanNet: A Deep Learning Approach to the Enhancement and Correction of Query Sketches for a 3D CAD Model Retrieval System
abstract: Proposes a deep learning approach to improve query sketches for better 3D CAD model retrieval. Analyzes sketch defects and trains a generative network to clean and enhance sketches before retrieval, improving retrieval accuracy.
method_summary: Generative network trained to remove defects (incomplete strokes, noise, distortions) from hand-drawn query sketches. Enhanced sketches yield significantly better retrieval results from CAD databases.

key_results.sketch_enhancement: improved retrieval accuracy through sketch cleaning

title: Multi-View Hierarchical Graph Neural Network for Sketch-Based 3D Shape Retrieval
abstract: Proposes a multi-view hierarchical graph neural network for sketch-based 3D shape retrieval (SBSR). Retrieves 3D shapes consistent with the category of input hand-drawn sketches using hierarchical graph representations of multi-view renderings.
method_summary: Hierarchical GNN processes multi-view renderings of 3D shapes as graph nodes with view-level and shape-level aggregation. Cross-modal alignment with sketch features for retrieval.

title: Leveraging Cross-View Correspondence and Cross-Modal Mining for 3D Retrieval
abstract: Investigates cross-modal retrieval between 3D shapes and textual descriptions. Augments 3D features through a scene representation transformer to generate cross-view correspondence features, enriching inherent features for better text-3D alignment.
method_summary: Scene representation transformer generates cross-view correspondence features from multi-view 3D renderings. Cross-modal mining strategy discovers hard negatives for better text-3D alignment.

key_results.cross_modal_retrieval: improved text-3D retrieval via cross-view features

title: SCA3D: Enhancing Cross-modal 3D Retrieval via 3D Shape and Caption Paired Data Augmentation
abstract: Enhances cross-modal 3D retrieval through paired data augmentation of 3D shapes and captions. Addresses the data scarcity problem in text-3D retrieval by generating diverse shape-caption pairs.
method_summary: Generates augmented 3D shape-caption pairs through geometric transformations and language paraphrasing. Contrastive learning on augmented pairs improves cross-modal retrieval robustness.

title: DYNAMO: Dependency-Aware Deep Learning Framework for Articulated Assembly Motion Prediction
abstract: Dependency-aware deep learning framework for predicting articulated assembly motion. Introduces MechBench benchmark for gear assembly motion prediction. Outperforms baselines with accurate and temporally consistent predictions.
method_summary: Models inter-part dependencies in articulated assemblies through dependency-aware graph neural network. Predicts temporally consistent motion trajectories for gear configurations.

title: A Novel B-rep Generative Model through Decoupling Topology and Geometry
abstract: B-rep generative model that decouples topology and geometry generation. Addresses the challenge that topology and geometry are tightly coupled in B-rep, making joint generation difficult. Generates topology first, then fills in geometry.
method_summary: Two-stage generation: first generates B-rep topology graph (face-edge-vertex connectivity), then predicts surface and curve geometry conditioned on the topology. Decoupling simplifies each stage.

key_results.decoupled_generation: improved B-rep generation via topology-geometry decoupling

title: Large Language Models for Computer-Aided Design: A Survey
abstract: Survey on how large language models are being applied to computer-aided design tasks. Covers LLM-based CAD generation, understanding, retrieval, and reasoning. Reviews datasets, benchmarks, and open challenges at the intersection of LLMs and CAD.
method_summary: Comprehensive survey covering LLM applications in CAD: text-to-CAD generation, CAD understanding and QA, code-based CAD manipulation, and multi-modal CAD reasoning.

key_results.survey: comprehensive coverage of LLMs for CAD

title: Self-Supervised Generative-Contrastive Learning of Multi-Modal Euclidean Input for 3D Shape Latent Representations
abstract: Combined generative and contrastive neural architecture for learning latent representations of 3D volumetric shapes. Uses two encoder branches for voxel grids and multi-view images, combining contrastive loss with reconstruction loss to avoid representation collapse.
method_summary: Dual-branch encoder (voxel + multi-view) with joint generative (reconstruction) and contrastive objectives. Avoids latent collapse while learning rich multi-modal 3D shape representations.
